updates.2026-03-23.title: Major studio upgrade
updates.2026-03-23.desc: Fully redesigned setup for live streams, lessons, and video blogging. Up to 4 cameras, professional teleprompter, modular furniture. Lounge area with Brazilian Santos coffee.
updates.2026-02-21.title: Everything upgraded
updates.2026-02-21.desc: Recording now goes directly to PC. Added a powerful RGB light that fills the entire room. Shoot on armchairs, stands, or standing — the format adapts to you.
updates.2026-02-14.title: New teleprompter & 4K monitor
updates.2026-02-14.desc: Professional teleprompter for reading scripts on camera. 4K monitor for live preview and presentations. Cable management done. White backdrop, podcast table, or no table — modular studio.
updates.2025-12-05.title: Lesson recording — new format
updates.2025-12-05.desc: Most popular format this month — educational lesson recording. Speaker + laptop with presentation. Added Aputure 150C for pink background lighting, main Kino Flo gives an even image.
updates.2025-10-12.title: Horizontal setup
updates.2025-10-12.desc: First time in two years — horizontal podcast setup. Feels fresh. New wide-angle lens captures the full loft-style scene. A great option if you want something different.
updates.2025-07-30.title: New format — interviews
updates.2025-07-30.desc: Moved away from the podcast format. Added a second boom stand — two chairs facing each other. Three cameras: one per guest + wide shot. Perfect for interviews and conversations.
